programs.title: Corner Gas
programs.desc: It's the eve of Brent's 40th birthday; to celebrate, the town has planned a midnight party complete with fireworks and a parade.

programs.title: Law & Order
programs.sub_title: Sunday in the Park With Jorge
programs.desc: Briscoe and Green must determine whether a woman's death was related to a rash of attacks by a crazed mob in Central Park.

programs.title: White Men Can't Jump
programs.desc: Two ballers, opposites who are seemingly miles apart, find they might have more in common than they imagined possible.

programs.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programs.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programs.title: A Complete Unknown
programs.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programs.title: Triangle of Sadness
programs.desc: Two models and a cleaning lady become stranded on a desert island with a group of billionaires.
